message.content:
@startuml
title 3.1.0 Get Participant Callback Details

ML API Adapter Service as ML_API_ADAPTER
  ML-API-ADAPTER as ML_API_ADAPTER_ACTOR
Central Services as CENTRAL_SERVICES
  Central Service API as CENTRAL_SERVICE_API
  Participant Handler as PARTICIPANT_HANDLER
  Participant DAO as PARTICIPANT_DAO
  Central Store as CENTRAL_STORE

ML_API_ADAPTER_ACTOR --> CENTRAL_SERVICE_API : 1 Request to get callback details - GET - /participants/{name}/endpoints?type={typeValue}
CENTRAL_SERVICE_API --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : 2 Fetch Callback details for Participant
PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> PARTICIPANT_DAO : 3 Fetch Participant
  error_code_3200 : Error code: 3200
PARTICIPANT_DAO --> CENTRAL_STORE : 4 Fetch Participant
CENTRAL_STORE --> PARTICIPANT_DAO : 5 Retrieved Participant
  participant : participant
PARTICIPANT_DAO --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : 6 Return Participant
PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : 7 Validate DFSP

alt Validate participant (success)
  PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : 8 check if "type" parameter is sent
  alt Check if "type" parameter is sent (Sent)
    PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> PARTICIPANT_DAO : 9 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
      error_code_3000 : Error code: 3000
    PARTICIPANT_DAO --> CENTRAL_STORE : 10 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
      condition : Condition: isActive = 1 [endpointTypeId = <type>]
    CENTRAL_STORE --> PARTICIPANT_DAO : 11 Retrieved Callback details for Participant and type
      participantEndpoint : participantEndpoint
    PARTICIPANT_DAO --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : 12 Return Callback details for Participant and type
      message : Message: { endpoints: {type: <type>, value: <value>} }
    PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> CENTRAL_SERVICE_API : 13 Return Callback details for Participant
    CENTRAL_SERVICE_API --> ML_API_ADAPTER_ACTOR : 14 Return Callback details for Participant
  alt Check if "type" parameter is sent (Not Sent)
    PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> PARTICIPANT_DAO : 15 Fetch Callback details for Participant
      error_code_3000 : Error code: 3000
    PARTICIPANT_DAO --> CENTRAL_STORE : 16 Fetch Callback details for Participant
      condition : Condition: isActive = 1
    CENTRAL_STORE --> PARTICIPANT_DAO : 17 Retrieved Callback details for Participant
      participantEndpoint : participantEndpoint
    PARTICIPANT_DAO --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : 18 Return Callback details for Participant
      message : Message: { endpoints: [{type: <type>, value: <value>}, {type: <type>, value: <value>}] }
    PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> CENTRAL_SERVICE_API : 19 Return Callback details for Participant
    CENTRAL_SERVICE_API --> ML_API_ADAPTER_ACTOR : 20 Return Callback details for Participant
  end
end

alt Validate participant (failure) / Error
  PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> PARTICIPANT_HANDLER : Validation failure / Error!
  message : Message: { "errorInformation": { "errorCode": <errorCode>, "errorDescription": <ErrorMessage> } }
  PARTICIPANT_HANDLER --> CENTRAL_SERVICE_API : 21 Return Error code: 3000, 3200
  CENTRAL_SERVICE_API --> ML_API_ADAPTER_ACTOR : 22 Return Error code: 3000, 3200
end

@enduml
